title: SoulCraft Team Schema
description: Defines a team of SoulCraft souls that collaborate sequentially.

id.description: URL-safe slug, used as directory name under teams/.

version.description: Semantic version of this team definition.

routing_strategy.description: How souls interact. 'sequential' = pipeline in array order.

souls.description: Ordered list of souls. Array order = execution order.

soul_ref.description: Soul ID — must match a directory under souls/.

team_role.description: This soul's role within the team.

directives.description: Team-specific instructions injected into this soul's Team Context.
